text: I've got both kids for soccer Saturday so you can run. Game times are 9 and 10:30.
Thank you. Long run is at Allen Pond, 6:30 start. I'll be back and at Amy's field by 9:30.
Saved you a chair. Eat real breakfast first, not just coffee.
mom are we still doing the sunday family dinner? can I bring a teammate
Yes, 5pm. One guest is fine. Eat the breakfast protein I flagged before practice, not just a granola snack.
ok ok thanks coach. we'll be there at 5
mom can you help me with my science project tonight after your shift
Yes, I'm home from Ashfield by 6. Have your notes out and we'll go through it together.
thank you!! everything's ready on the table
Morning sweetheart. My fasting glucose was 138 today, a little higher than usual. Should I worry?
One reading is not a trend, but log it. Keep breakfast to the eggs and oatmeal we planned and check again tomorrow. I'll call after clinic.
Okay honey, I wrote it down. Thank you for keeping an eye on me.
Hi Courtney, it's Aunt Carol. Are you all coming up to Silver Spring for Easter? I want to plan the food.
We'd love to. The four of us plus Grandma Nancy. I'll bring a roasted veggie tray and something diabetic friendly for her.
Wonderful. I'll handle the ham and the sides. So glad you're all coming.
Hey Court, it's James. Coming down from Baltimore Sunday, can I stop by to see the kids?
Of course. Come for the 5pm family dinner. Kyle has a track meet story he's been saving for his uncle.
Perfect, I'll be there at 5. Tell Kevin I'm bringing the good coffee.
Kids are set for soccer Saturday, I'll cover the 9am and you take 10:30.
Morning Nancy, did you log your fasting glucose yet? Metformin with breakfast please.
Hi Aunt Carol, calling you Sunday after the family video call.
Dina, what's the call for Saturday's long run? I have 18 on the plan.
Laura, can Kyle catch a ride to the game with you Saturday?
Dr. Adler, recruitment is at 14 participants for the diabetes study.
Great game today buddy, that pass to the striker was perfect.
Baked chicken tonight sweetheart, just how you like it.
Grandma Nancy's fasting sugar was 132 this morning, better than last week.
No cornbread without protein tonight, I portioned baked chicken for you.
The kids loved the birthday card, thank you.
Plantar fascia is quiet this week, cleared to push the tempo.
Bringing extra water for the group run, meet at Allen Pond at 6.
I'll have the de-identified export ready before Friday's meeting.
Piano practice 15 minutes before screen time please.
Did you take your allergy medicine this morning?
Long run done, 20 miles at marathon pace. Legs are toast but the fuel plan worked.
Dr. Armah's appointment is the 28th at 10:30, I'll drive you.
Silver Spring traffic was rough but we made it for dinner.
Marine Corps goal is still sub-3:45, want to run the last 6 at goal pace.
Thanks for watching Amy during the tumor board meeting.
Tumor board consult notes are uploaded to Box.
Biscuits and fried rice for dinner, your favorite.
So proud of your reading, one more chapter before bed.
Can you grab oat milk and sweet potatoes on the way home?
Your evening Glipizide is set out, tea after if you'd like.

Track was fast this morning, hit the 800s at 5K effort.

Piano recital moved to 4pm, Mr. Chen confirmed.
Walked your 20 minutes today? Knee feeling okay?
